paddingSize.description:
Adjust the padding.
When using this setting it's best to be consistent throughout all similar usages.

hasEmbellish.description: Renders a fancy little visual in the top left corner of the side bar

sticky.description: Adds `position: sticky` and affords for any fixed position headers.

minWidth.description:
A minimum width is necessary to maintain size.
Be sure to take `paddingSize` into account.

responsive.description: Sets the `minWidth` to 100% when within these breakpoints.
